name: @slothfulchat/web-app
description: deltachat-desktop's frontend running standalone in the browser on the wasm core.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild --format=esm --bundle src/runtime.ts --outfile=dist/runtime.js && esbuild --format=esm --bundle src/blobs-sw.ts --outfile=dist/blobs-sw.js && node sw-manifest.mjs
scripts.start: pnpm assemble && pnpm build && pnpm serve
